name: Skilljar Customer Education API
what_it_does: Skilljar customer education LMS REST API for customer onboarding training, product certification, and partner enablement. Enables AI agents to manage course and learning path publishing for automated customer training content deployment, handle student enrollment and registration for customer training onboarding workflow, access course completion and certificate tracking for customer success automation, retrieve training analytics and completion reporting for customer health score integration, manage custom domain and branded portal for white-label customer education hub, handle training assessment and quiz management for product knowledge evaluation, access completion webhook delivery for Salesforce/Gainsight CS automation triggers, retrieve registration data and student metadata for customer segmentation analysis, manage on-demand and live training scheduling for blended customer education programs, and integrate Skilljar with Salesforce, Gainsight, HubSpot, Zendesk, and customer success platforms for customer training lifecycle automation.
use_cases: Onboarding customers from customer success agents
Certifying product users from training program agents
Enabling partners from channel education agents
Tracking training adoption from CS health score agents
not_for: Internal employee training and compliance (use Absorb or TalentLMS)
best_when: A SaaS company or technology vendor wanting AI agents to automate customer onboarding training delivery, product certification, partner enablement, and training-to-CS health score integration within Skilljar's purpose-built customer education platform.
avoid_when: GDPR EU CUSTOMER LEARNER DATA: Automated Skilljar processing of EU customer learner data constitutes personal data under GDPR; verify Skilljar data processing agreement and EU data residency configuration; automated EU customer training data in US-only processing creates GDPR Chapter V issue. CUSTOMER TRAINING COMPLETION AND PRODUCT ENTITLEMENT GATING: Automated product feature unlock gated to Skilljar training completion must implement idempotent entitlement grant; completion event duplication creates double feature unlock; implement idempotent entitlement check before automated product access grant. SALESFORCE SYNC ACCURACY FOR TRAINING ADOPTION METRICS: Automated Skilljar completion data sync to Salesforce for training adoption scoring must handle sync lag; Salesforce Opportunity stage decisions made before Skilljar sync completion reflect stale training data; implement sync completion confirmation before critical CS decisions. Content license for third-party course content — automated Skilljar course delivery must ensure content licensing covers customer training use case; some content licenses restrict use to internal employee training only; automated delivery to external customers without proper license creates copyright violation.

auth.notes: Skilljar uses API key authentication (Basic Auth). REST API with JSON. Seattle, Washington HQ. Founded 2013. Private (Mayfield Fund, Shea Ventures investors; Series B+). 600+ SaaS company customers. Purpose-built customer education LMS for SaaS onboarding, certification, and partner training. Salesforce, Gainsight, HubSpot, Zendesk integrations. Competes with Northpass (Gainsight), Thought Industries, and LearnUpon for customer education LMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription based on learner volume and features
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by learner volume and feature tier; custom enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Seattle WA. Private, Mayfield Fund investor. Founded 2013. 600+ SaaS customers. Annual subscription by learner volume.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; enrollment and completion API throttled per account

known_agent_gotchas: API KEY ONLY — BROAD ACCESS WITHOUT SCOPE GRANULARITY: Skilljar uses API key authentication without granular scope control; automated agents using the API key have access to all training data across the account; use separate API keys for different integration purposes and rotate regularly

COMPLETION WEBHOOK IDEMPOTENCY FOR CS ENTITLEMENT GATES: Skilljar completion webhooks may deliver duplicate events during webhook retry cycles; automated product feature unlock or Gainsight health score update triggered by completion webhook must implement idempotent processing with Skilljar completion ID deduplication

SALESFORCE SYNC TIMING FOR CS DECISION WORKFLOWS: Skilljar-to-Salesforce training completion sync occurs on schedule, not real-time; automated CS opportunity or renewal decisions based on Salesforce training adoption data may reflect data that is hours stale; implement Skilljar API completion check before critical CS workflow triggers

US-ONLY DATA RESIDENCY FOR EU CUSTOMER TRAINING: Skilljar processes all data in US AWS; automated EU customer learner data processing in Skilljar without adequate safeguards (SCCs, adequacy decision) creates GDPR Chapter V data transfer compliance issue for EU-based customers

Customer training content licensing scope verification — automated Skilljar course delivery to external customers must confirm content licensing covers external customer training; employee-training-licensed content used for external customer education creates copyright violation; review license scope before automated external delivery

Free vs paid training tier access control — automated free and paid training tier management in Skilljar must enforce course access by registration type; automated free registration users accessing paid certification courses creates revenue leakage and content license violation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Customer education LMS. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US. Customer training and certification data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer education LMS. SOC2, GDPR. API key. US. Customer learning and certification data.
